subject: refactor(app): rename app from Few Lap to FuelHunt
body:
Renamed across all user-facing and config locations:
- app.json: name, slug, scheme
- package.json + package-lock.json: package name
- Tab layout header title
- README.md title and status
- USER_GUIDE.md overview
- Supabase config project_id

Tags: branding, rename, config
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: rebranding
Semver: minor
